titleStmt.title: SII 42.149: original edition by C Somasundara Rao
No. 149. (A.R. No. 15 of 1955-56.) Saṅgam, Kovur Taluk, Nellore District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On the stones built into the prākāra wall of the Saṅgamēśvara temple.
Dated Śaka 1539, Piṅgaḷa, Jyēshṭha śu. 15, corresponding to A.D. 1617, June 9.

States that Nalla-Guruvayya, son of Peḍḍi-batta and Virūpākshamma and grandson of Pōtā-batta of Poṅgūr belonging to Viśvakarma-gōtra, consecrated Kāśī-Viśvanātha along with some subsidiary deities. Contains below the record, the names of devotees: Aṅgappa Ekāmbaram, Yeraguruvu and Bālaguruvappa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
vighnēśvara [.] svasti śrī śālivāhana śakaṁ 1539 Agu piṁgaḷa saṁvvatsara jyēṣṭha
śudha(ddha) 15 lu rājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī komāra veṁkaṭrāyalu rā
jyaṁ śāyaga viśvaka¨rma gōtra poṁgguri pōtābattu pautrapeddibatta puttra virūpākṣa
ṁma tanūbhava śrī nallaguruvayya śrī kāśī viśvanāthādi parivāra sahita pratiṣṭha [.]
Aṁgappa yēkāṁbraṁ yeraguruvu bālaguravappa vīru(ra)lu sadāsēva [.]
Digital edition of SII 42.149 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
